title: Fort Funston - San Francisco, California - Yelp
content: Fort Funston is stunning!!! Dogs are allowed off leash and there are a lot of different trails and areas to walk around so it never feels too crowded.

title: Fort Funston - All You SHOULD Know Before Going 2026 (with ...
content: Gorgeous views of the ocean and the city. Paved trails. Ample, free parking. VERY dog friendly. The hike down to and back from the sand is strenuous.

title: I don't hear enough about Fort Funston : r/sanfrancisco - Reddit
content: I love it. Been there at least 100 times (over 7yrs) with my dogs. It's a hit with dog owners, hang gliders and R/C pilots.

title: Fort Funston Sunset Trail, California - 210 Reviews, Map | AllTrails
content: Another day at Fort Funston, this time with some friends. Absolutely a beautiful place to be, with stunning coastal views and fresh ocean air all around!

title: Fort Funston - Fantastic Views of the Pacific Ocean
content: Fort Funston is a favorite place to walk a dog, explore bunkers and tunnels from World War II, watch hang gliders soar high above the surf.
